scripts.build: npm run doctor && npm run render:scenes && npm run obs:package
scripts.build:premium: npm run render:scenes && npm run obs:package
scripts.verify:premium: for f in dist/renders/*; do echo "===== $f ====="; ffprobe -v error -select_streams v:0 -show_entries stream=codec_name,width,height,r_frame_rate,pix_fmt -show_entries format=duration,size,bit_rate -of default=noprint_wrappers=1 "$f"; done
